name: Sterling Ranch Farmers' Market
notes: On-file website (denverfarmersmarket.com) is confirmed correct and official: it is the site for the operator 'Metro Denver Farmers' Market', which runs the Sterling Ranch market at Providence Park (Wed 3-7pm, June 24-Oct 14) among three other metro-area locations. On-file Facebook (facebook.com/denverfarmersmarket) confirmed via the site's footer link. Site is a single flat page with no dedicated per-location subpage or URL. Products listed only generically as 'Fresh Produce' with no vendor-type breakdown. Third-party sources (Denverite, Westword) claim SNAP/EBT is accepted at this market, but the official site itself does not state this anywhere, so SNAP was omitted per instructions to only use clearly-stated official info. No ADA accessibility, certified organic status, or phone number stated on the official site. Email listed is the operator's general Market Manager contact (dfmmgrrich@comcast.net), not location-specific. Address confirmed as matching the on-file street address (8100 Piney River Ave), with 'Providence Park' as the venue name added for clarity.
